Document:
# Rule 7: Play Your Role You are expected to utilize your slot and behave appropriately for your role. Every role has a function, and the player taking the role is expected to perform it. If you have a job you are supposed to be doing, ignoring it in favor of other tasks violates this rule. Furthermore, wasting your slot—such as by suiciding or improperly leaving the game—is punishable, as you are removing a slot another player could have been properly playing.
## Going AFK or Leaving the Game If you are a Marine and need to leave the game, return to the ship, go to cryo, and put yourself in a cryo tube. This will free up your job slot and allow another player to take over your job. If you are unable to reach cryo, AHelp an administrator. If you are the Queen, use AHelp to inform the admins of your imminent departure. Leaving without cryoing yourself or informing the admins puts you at risk of a role ban, especially if your role is critical.
Certain roles carry a risk of punishment for leaving the game or going AFK without warning. This is especially strict at the beginning of the round (approximately the first 20 minutes).
## High-Responsibility Roles - Commanding Officer/Captain - Pilot (if they are the only pilot) - Squad Leader - Weapons Specialist - Smartgun Operator - Queen
## Medium-Responsibility Roles - Executive Officer - Department Heads - Medical Doctor
